en: A MASKIL OF ETHAN THE EZRAHITE. I will sing of the steadfast love of the LORD, forever; with my mouth I will make known your faithfulness to all generations.
zh: 我要永遠歌唱耶和華的慈愛， 世世代代用口傳揚你的信實。

en: For I said, "Steadfast love will be built up forever; in the heavens you will establish your faithfulness."
zh: 我要說：“你的慈愛必永遠建立； 你的信實，你必堅立在天上。

en: You have said, "I have made a covenant with my chosen one; I have sworn to David my servant:
zh: 你曾說：‘我和我所揀選的人立了約， 向我的僕人大衛起了誓，說：

en: 'I will establish your offspring forever, and build your throne for all generations.'"Selah
zh: 我必永遠堅立你的後裔， 也必世世代代建立你的王位。’”

en: Let the heavens praise your wonders, O LORD, your faithfulness in the assembly of the holy ones!
zh: 耶和華啊！諸天要稱頌你的奇事； 在聖者的會中，你的信實也要被稱頌。

en: For who in the skies can be compared to the LORD? Who among the heavenly beings is like the LORD,
zh: 在天上，誰能和耶和華相比呢？ 在全能者的眾子中，誰能像耶和華呢？

en: a God greatly to be feared in the council of the holy ones, and awesome above all who are around him?
zh: 在聖者的議會中， 神是令人驚懼的， 比一切在他周圍的都更為可畏。

en: O LORD God of hosts, who is mighty as you are, O LORD, with your faithfulness all around you?
zh: 耶和華萬軍之 神啊！有誰像你？ 耶和華啊！你是大能的，你的信實在你的周圍。

en: You rule the raging of the sea; when its waves rise, you still them.
zh: 你管轄海洋的狂濤， 波浪翻騰的時候，你使它們平息。

en: You crushed Rahab like a carcass; you scattered your enemies with your mighty arm.
zh: 你打碎了拉哈伯，好像已遭刺殺的人； 你用有力的膀臂，趕散了你的仇敵。

en: The heavens are yours; the earth also is yours; the world and all that is in it, you have founded them.
zh: 天是你的，地也是你的； 世界和世界充滿的，都是你建立的。

en: The north and the south, you have created them; Tabor and Hermon joyously praise your name.
zh: 南北都是你創造的， 他泊和黑門都因你的名歡呼。

en: You have a mighty arm; strong is your hand, high your right hand.
zh: 你有大能的膀臂， 你的手強而有力，你的右手高舉。

en: Righteousness and justice are the foundation of your throne; steadfast love and faithfulness go before you.
zh: 公義和公正是你寶座的基礎， 慈愛和信實行在你前面。

en: Blessed are the people who know the festal shout, who walk, O LORD, in the light of your face,
zh: 曉得向你歡呼的人民是有福的， 耶和華啊！他們在你的臉光中行走。

en: who exult in your name all the day and in your righteousness are exalted.
zh: 他們因你的名終日歡呼， 因你的公義被高舉。

en: For you are the glory of their strength; by your favor our horn is exalted.
zh: 因為你是他們的榮耀和力量； 因你的恩惠，我們的角得以高舉。

en: For our shield belongs to the LORD, our king to the Holy One of Israel.
zh: 因為我們的盾牌是耶和華， 我們的君王是以色列的聖者。

en: Of old you spoke in a vision to your godly one, and said: "I have granted help to one who is mighty; I have exalted one chosen from the people.
zh: 那時，你在異象中告訴你的聖民說： “我幫助了一位勇士， 我從民中興起了一位青年 。

en: I have found David, my servant; with my holy oil I have anointed him,
zh: 我找到我的僕人大衛， 用我的聖膏油膏他。

en: so that my hand shall be established with him; my arm also shall strengthen him.
zh: 我的手必堅立他， 我的膀臂必堅固他。

en: The enemy shall not outwit him; the wicked shall not humble him.
zh: 仇敵必不能欺騙他， 兇惡的人必不能壓迫他。

en: I will crush his foes before him and strike down those who hate him.
zh: 我要在他的面前擊碎他的敵人， 擊殺那些恨他的人。

en: My faithfulness and my steadfast love shall be with him, and in my name shall his horn be exalted.
zh: 我的信實和慈愛必與他同在， 他的角必因我的名被高舉。

en: I will set his hand on the sea and his right hand on the rivers.
zh: 我必使他的左手伸到大海， 使他的右手伸到大河。

en: He shall cry to me, 'You are my Father, my God, and the Rock of my salvation.'
zh: 他必呼叫我，說：‘你是我的父、我的 神、拯救我的磐石。’

en: And I will make him the firstborn, the highest of the kings of the earth.
zh: 我也要立他為長子， 為世上最高的君王。

en: My steadfast love I will keep for him forever, and my covenant will stand firm for him.
zh: 我要永遠保持我對他的慈愛， 我和他所立的約必堅立。

en: I will establish his offspring forever and his throne as the days of the heavens.
zh: 我要使他的後裔存到永遠， 使他的王位好像天一樣長久。

en: If his children forsake my law and do not walk according to my rules,
zh: 如果他的子孫離棄我的律法， 不照著我的典章而行；

en: if they violate my statutes and do not keep my commandments,
zh: 如果他們違背我的律例， 不遵守我的誡命，

en: then I will punish their transgression with the rod and their iniquity with stripes,
zh: 我就用杖責罰他們的過犯， 用鞭責罰他們的罪孽。

en: but I will not remove from him my steadfast love or be false to my faithfulness.
zh: 但我必不把我的慈愛從他身上收回， 也必不背棄我的信實。

en: I will not violate my covenant or alter the word that went forth from my lips.
zh: 我必不違背我的約， 也不改變我口中所出的話。

en: Once for all I have sworn by my holiness; I will not lie to David.
zh: 我斷然指著自己的聖潔起誓，說： ‘我決不向大衛說謊。

en: His offspring shall endure forever, his throne as long as the sun before me.
zh: 他的後裔必存到永遠， 他的王位在我面前必像太陽長存，

en: Like the moon it shall be established forever, a faithful witness in the skies." Selah
zh: 又像月亮永遠堅立， 作天上確實的見證。’”

en: But now you have cast off and rejected; you are full of wrath against your anointed.
zh: 你卻惱怒你的受膏者， 丟掉棄絕他。

en: You have renounced the covenant with your servant; you have defiled his crown in the dust.
zh: 你捨棄了和你僕人所立的約， 把他的冠冕玷污在地。

en: You have breached all his walls; you have laid his strongholds in ruins.
zh: 你拆毀了他的一切城牆， 使他的堡壘成廢堆。

en: All who pass by plunder him; he has become the scorn of his neighbors.
zh: 過路的都搶掠他， 他成了鄰國的人羞辱的對象。

en: You have exalted the right hand of his foes; you have made all his enemies rejoice.
zh: 你高舉了他敵人的右手， 使他所有的仇敵歡喜。

en: You have also turned back the edge of his sword, and you have not made him stand in battle.
zh: 你使他的刀劍捲刃， 使他在戰場上站立不住。

en: You have made his splendor to cease and cast his throne to the ground.
zh: 你使他的光輝消失， 把他的王位推翻 。

en: You have cut short the days of his youth; you have covered him with shame. Selah
zh: 你減少了他青春的日子， 使他披上恥辱。

en: How long, O LORD? Will you hide yourself forever? How long will your wrath burn like fire?
zh: 耶和華啊！這要到幾時呢？ 你要永遠隱藏自己嗎？ 你的烈怒像火一般焚燒，要到幾時呢？

en: Remember how short my time is! For what vanity you have created all the children of man!
zh: 求你記念我的一生多麼短暫， 你創造的世人是多麼虛幻呢！

en: What man can live and never see death? Who can deliver his soul from the power of Sheol? Selah
zh: 有哪一個人能長活不死， 能救自己的性命脫離陰間的權勢呢？

en: Lord, where is your steadfast love of old, which by your faithfulness you swore to David?
zh: 主啊！你從前指著你的信實向大衛起誓要施的慈愛， 現今在哪裡呢？

en: Remember, O Lord, how your servants are mocked, and how I bear in my heart the insults of all the many nations,
zh: 主啊！求你記念你僕人所受的羞辱， 記念我心裡 承擔著萬民的羞辱。

en: with which your enemies mock, O LORD, with which they mock the footsteps of your anointed.
zh: 耶和華啊！你的仇敵用這羞辱羞辱了你的僕人， 羞辱了你受膏者的腳蹤。

en: Blessed be the LORD forever! Amen and Amen.
zh: 耶和華是應當稱頌的，直到永遠！ 阿們，阿們！
